ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the purchase */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product purchased */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the transaction took place */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Channel of the transaction (e.g., online, in-store) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which the product should be reordered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the product information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_member" INTEGER /* Whether the customer is a loyalty member */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Number of loyalty points the customer has */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the last purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "association_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association rule */,
  "antecedent" TEXT /* Antecedent of the rule (e.g., product ID) */,
  "consequent" TEXT /* Consequent of the rule (e.g., product ID) */,
  "support" REAL /* Support of the rule (e.g., 0.01) */,
  "confidence" REAL /* Confidence of the rule (e.g., 0.5) */,
  "lift" REAL /* Lift of the rule (e.g., 1.2) */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage of the rule (e.g., 0.05) */,
  "conviction" REAL /* Conviction of the rule (e.g., 1.5) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the rule */,
  "rule_strength" REAL /* A combined metric of support, confidence, and lift to indicate the strength of the rule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_rules_antecedent FOREIGN KEY ("antecedent") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_association_rules_consequent FOREIGN KEY ("consequent") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_statistics" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each association rule */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the rule (e.g., number of products involved) */,
  "antecedents" INTEGER /* Number of antecedents in the rule */,
  "consequents" INTEGER /* Number of consequents in the rule */,
  "antecedent_items" TEXT /* List of antecedent items */,
  "consequent_items" TEXT /* List of consequent items */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the statistics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, marketing team) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
